stt.heardError: Dhiifama, si dhaga'uu hin dandeenye. Mee irra deebi'ii yaalaa.
stt.micAccessError: Maaykiroofoonii argachuu hin dandeenye. Hayyama ilaali.

error.passwordRequired: Jecha icciitii faayilii .ania icciitii ta'eef barbaachisa
error.noSource: Maddi avatar hin kennamne (avatarUrl ykn avatarData) .

greetings.0: Hi! Har'a akkamittan isin gargaaruu danda'a?
greetings.1: Akkam! Baga nagaan dhufte! Maal siif gochuu danda'a?
greetings.2: Achi kan jirtu! Si haasofsiisuu kootti baay'een gammada!
greetings.3: Akkam! Gargaaruuf as jira. Maal si barbaachisa?
greetings.4: Akkam! Akkam jirta? Akkamittan faayidaa qabaachuu danda'a?
